title: MA 104 Lecture 7: Variation of Parameters and Higher-Order Linear ODEs

frontMatter.title: MA 104 Lecture 7: Variation of Parameters and Higher-Order Linear ODEs
frontMatter.lecture_name: Variation of Parameters & Higher Order ODEs
frontMatter.topic: Method of Variation of Parameters, Higher Order Linear ODEs, Wronskian, Homogeneous and Non-Homogeneous ODEs
frontMatter.summary: Lecture notes covering the Method of Variation of Parameters for second-order ODEs and foundational concepts for n-th order linear ODEs, including linearity, Wronskian, and characteristic equations for constant coefficient cases.
table_of_contents: Higher Order Linear ODEs: Definitions and Concepts
Existence of a General Solution for Homogeneous ODEs
Homogeneous Linear ODEs with Constant Coefficients

key_formulas.name: Wronskian for two functions
key_formulas.note: Used to check linear independence and in variation of parameters for 2nd order ODEs.

key_formulas.name: Particular Solution (Variation of Parameters)
key_formulas.formula: y_p(x) = -y_1(x) \int \frac{y_2(x)r(x)}{W(y_1, y_2)(x)} \, dx + y_2(x) \int \frac{y_1(x)r(x)}{W(y_1, y_2)(x)} \, dx
key_formulas.note: Formula for finding a particular solution to $y'' + P(x)y' + Q(x)y = r(x)$.

key_formulas.name: Wronskian for n functions
key_formulas.formula: W(y_1, \dots, y_n)(x) = \det \begin{pmatrix} y_1 & y_2 & \dots & y_n \\ y_1' & y_2' & \dots & y_n' \\ \vdots & \vdots & \ddots & \vdots \\ y_1^{(n-1)} & y_2^{(n-1)} & \dots & y_n^{(n-1)} \end{pmatrix}
key_formulas.note: Determinant used to test linear independence of $n$ solutions to an n-th order homogeneous ODE.

key_formulas.name: Characteristic Equation
key_formulas.note: Algebraic equation derived by substituting $y=e^{\lambda x}$ into a homogeneous linear ODE with constant coefficients.

key_formulas.name: General Solution of Non-homogeneous ODE
key_formulas.note: The total solution is the sum of a particular solution and the general homogeneous solution.
